overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired witcher character holding a torch while exploring a medieval stone castle at night. The character ascends through interior corridors to reach a foggy overlook of a distant harbor city, walks along the castle wall, then descends back down.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stone staircase with wooden paneled walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone stairs through a narrow corridor while holding a torch

entered.detail: wide stone stairs ascending through the castle interior
dark wood paneling lining the corridor walls
arched stone doorway at the top of the stairs leading outside
metal chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone staircase within a medieval castle, illuminated by torchlight. Wooden paneled walls line the corridor, and a hanging lantern is visible at the top of the stairs near an arched exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle terrace overlooking foggy harbor city

events.description: exits enclosed corridor onto open castle terrace revealing the night sky and distant city

agents.ego_description: emerging onto the terrace and walking toward the overlook to view the cityscape

entered.detail: open stone balcony with paved flooring
large metal brazier burning with flames
tall stone tower with narrow windows
foggy medieval city with lit windows across the water
low stone wall along the edge of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character exits the corridor onto a stone terrace overlooking a foggy harbor city at night. A lit brazier burns on the left, and a tall castle tower rises on the right as the character approaches the railing to view the distant cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle wall walkway with panoramic city view

events.description: character slows and stops at the end of the walkway to observe the city

agents.ego_description: walking along the castle wall walkway and pausing to look out at the foggy harbor and distant buildings

entered.detail: narrow stone path along the castle exterior
dark harbor water below the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along an exterior stone walkway perched on the castle wall, with the foggy harbor and distant city visible to the left. The path continues past lit windows in the castle wall until the character stops at the end to survey the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stone stairs along castle exterior and interior

events.description: character turns around and begins descending the stairs back toward the interior
re-enters the enclosed corridor from the exterior terrace

agents.ego_description: turning around at the end of the walkway and walking back down the stone stairs into the castle interior

entered.detail: dark wood paneling lining the interior corridor
metal chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character turns around at the end of the exterior walkway and begins descending the stone stairs. The castle wall shifts from the right to the left side as the character turns, then the character re-enters the enclosed corridor with wooden paneled walls.

events.description: another guard character comes into view standing at the bottom of the stairs

agents.ego_description: descending the final stairs and approaching the ground level where a guard stands watch

notable_agents.action: standing guard holding a torch near the bottom of the staircase

entered.detail: ground level stone archway marking the exit from the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character descends the final section of stairs toward the ground level corridor. Near the bottom, another guard stands watch holding a torch. The character approaches the stone archway at the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the enclosed depths of a medieval castle to a foggy outdoor overlook before descending back into the interior. It begins by following the character up a narrow stone staircase lined with wooden panels, moving toward a hanging lantern and an arched exit. As the character steps outside, the scene opens onto a stone terrace where a burning brazier and a tall tower frame a sweeping view of a foggy harbor city at night. The camera then tracks along an exterior walkway past lit windows and the distant cityscape before turning around to retrace the path. Finally, the movement shifts back indoors as the character descends the stairs, passing a torch-bearing guard and approaching a stone archway at the ground level.
